testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::file_exists
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=file_exists warning=False message=File exists

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::python_compiles
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=py_compile warning=False message=Python compilation succeeded

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::cli_no_args_fails
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT --- Usage: python3 verify_tpm_measurements.py <path to pcr.log> <path to eventlog.log> --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::cli_one_arg_fails
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/4_cli_one_arg_fails/pcr.yaml Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT --- Usage: python3 verify_tpm_measurements.py <path to pcr.log> <path to eventlog.log> --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::cli_missing_files_fail_nonzero
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/5_cli_missing_files_fail_nonzero/missing_pcr.yaml /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/5_cli_missing_files_fail_nonzero/missing_event.yaml Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT --- Verify that the cumulative SHA256 measurements from the event log match the TPM PCRs 0-7 : FAIL ERROR: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/5_cli_missing_files_fail_nonzero/missing_pcr.yaml' --- STDERR ---

testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: python3 /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/6_cli_invalid_event_yaml_fails/pcr.yaml /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/6_cli_invalid_event_yaml_fails/event.yaml Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT --- Verify that the cumulative SHA256 measurements from the event log match the TPM PCRs 0-7 : FAIL ERROR: while parsing a flow sequence in "/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/6_cli_invalid_event_yaml_fails/event.yaml", line 1, column 6 expected ',' or ']', but got '<stream end>' in "/home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/6_cli_invalid_event_yaml_fails/event.yaml", line 2, column 1 --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::cli_mock_open_raises_on_event_log
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=module_cli warning=False message=Module CLI check passed details: Work dir: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/7_cli_mock_open_raises_on_event_log Command: python /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/7_cli_mock_open_raises_on_event_log/pcr.yaml /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/7_cli_mock_open_raises_on_event_log/event.yaml Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT --- Verify that the cumulative SHA256 measurements from the event log match the TPM PCRs 0-7 : FAIL ERROR: mocked read failure --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::cli_mock_yaml_safe_load_raises_on_event_log
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=module_cli warning=False message=Module CLI check passed details: Work dir: /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/8_cli_mock_yaml_safe_load_raises_on_event_log Command: python /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/8_cli_mock_yaml_safe_load_raises_on_event_log/pcr.yaml /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/reports/_work/verify_tpm_measurements/verify_tpm_measurements/8_cli_mock_yaml_safe_load_raises_on_event_log/event.yaml Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT --- Verify that the cumulative SHA256 measurements from the event log match the TPM PCRs 0-7 : FAIL ERROR: mocked event parse failure --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::cli_all_required_measurements_pass
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: ./run_case.sh /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- Verify that the cumulative SHA256 measurements from the event log match the TPM PCRs 0-7 : PASS Verify the first event is the EV_NO_ACTION for the Specification ID version : PASS Verify EV_POST_CODE events for measurements of firmware to PCR[0] with recommended strings : PASS Verify EV_POST_CODE events for measurements of signed critical data to PCR[0]. : PASS Verify secure boot policy measurements are made into PCR[7] with EV_EFI_VARIABLE_DRIVER_CONFIG : PASS Verify BootOrder and Boot#### variables are measured in PCR[1] withEV_EFI_VARIABLE_BOOT/EV_EFI_VARIABLE_BOOT2 : PASS Verify boot attempts measured in PCR[4] with EV_EFI_ACTION event type : PASS Verify security relevant configuration data are measured in into PCR[1] with EV_EFI_HANDOFF_TABLES : PASS Verify presence of EV_SEPARATOR event for each PCR : PASS Verify EV_TABLE_OF_DEVICES events for measurements of config data to PCR[1] with recommended strings : PASS Verify presence of “Exit Boot Services Invocation” event with EV_EFI_ACTION type : PASS --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::cli_pcr_mismatch_reports_fail_but_runs
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: ./run_case.sh /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- Verify that the cumulative SHA256 measurements from the event log match the TPM PCRs 0-7 : FAIL PCR[1] measurements does not match for sha256 TPM PCR[1] : good1 Eventlog PCR[1] : bad1 Verify the first event is the EV_NO_ACTION for the Specification ID version : PASS Verify EV_POST_CODE events for measurements of firmware to PCR[0] with recommended strings : PASS Verify EV_POST_CODE events for measurements of signed critical data to PCR[0]. : PASS Verify secure boot policy measurements are made into PCR[7] with EV_EFI_VARIABLE_DRIVER_CONFIG : PASS Verify BootOrder and Boot#### variables are measured in PCR[1] withEV_EFI_VARIABLE_BOOT/EV_EFI_VARIABLE_BOOT2 : PASS Verify boot attempts measured in PCR[4] with EV_EFI_ACTION event type : PASS Verify security relevant configuration data are measured in into PCR[1] with EV_EFI_HANDOFF_TABLES : PASS Verify presence of EV_SEPARATOR event for each PCR : PASS Verify EV_TABLE_OF_DEVICES events for measurements of config data to PCR[1] with recommended strings : PASS Verify presence of “Exit Boot Services Invocation” event with EV_EFI_ACTION type : PASS --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::cli_boot_variable_missing_reports_fail_but_runs
testcase.system-out: file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=cli warning=False message=CLI check passed details: Command: ./run_case.sh /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 0 --- STDOUT --- Verify that the cumulative SHA256 measurements from the event log match the TPM PCRs 0-7 : PASS Verify the first event is the EV_NO_ACTION for the Specification ID version : PASS Verify EV_POST_CODE events for measurements of firmware to PCR[0] with recommended strings : PASS Verify EV_POST_CODE events for measurements of signed critical data to PCR[0]. : PASS Verify secure boot policy measurements are made into PCR[7] with EV_EFI_VARIABLE_DRIVER_CONFIG : PASS Verify BootOrder and Boot#### variables are measured in PCR[1] withEV_EFI_VARIABLE_BOOT/EV_EFI_VARIABLE_BOOT2 : FAIL BootOrder/Boot#### variable measurements not found Verify boot attempts measured in PCR[4] with EV_EFI_ACTION event type : PASS Verify security relevant configuration data are measured in into PCR[1] with EV_EFI_HANDOFF_TABLES : PASS Verify presence of EV_SEPARATOR event for each PCR : PASS Verify EV_TABLE_OF_DEVICES events for measurements of config data to PCR[1] with recommended strings : PASS Verify presence of “Exit Boot Services Invocation” event with EV_EFI_ACTION type : PASS --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::pcr_comparison_requires_at_least_one_supported_algorithm_match
testcase.system-out:
file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=cli warning=True message=
PHASE: expectation_check CHECK TYPE: expect_exit_code
EXPECTED: exit code = 0
ACTUAL: exit code = 1 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- PHASE: expectation_check CHECK TYPE: expect_stdout_or_stderr_contains
EXPECTED: FAIL
ACTUAL STDOUT: Verify that the cumulative SHA256 measurements from the event log match the TPM PCRs 0-7 : PASS ERROR: list index out of range
ACTUAL STDERR: <empty> details: Command: ./run_case.sh /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT --- Verify that the cumulative SHA256 measurements from the event log match the TPM PCRs 0-7 : PASS ERROR: list index out of range --- STDERR ---

testcase.name: verify_tpm_measurements::verify_tpm_measurements.py::truncated_pcr_arrays_are_reported_cleanly
testcase.system-out:
file=common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py suite=verify_tpm_measurements phase=case type=cli warning=True message=
PHASE: expectation_check CHECK TYPE: expect_exit_code
EXPECTED: exit code = 0
ACTUAL: exit code = 1 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- PHASE: expectation_check CHECK TYPE: expect_stdout_or_stderr_contains
EXPECTED: FAIL
ACTUAL STDOUT: ERROR: list index out of range
ACTUAL STDERR: <empty> details: Command: ./run_case.sh /home/vepav01/arm-systemready/common/linux_scripts/verify_tpm_measurements.py Shell mode: no Timeout seconds: 20 Timed out: no Exit code: 1 --- STDOUT --- ERROR: list index out of range --- STDERR ---
